name: clv_fade
label: CLV exhaustion fade · 5m
method: Inverse of clv_momentum: a 5m bar closing in the extreme of its range on above-median volume OVERSHOOTS; fade it -> predict next bar AGAINST the close location. Direction found by rejecting the continuation hypothesis (robust negative 5/5 windows both symbols).
risk: Paper only until leak test + walk-forward pass. Agent-authored.

provenance.hypothesis: Inverse of clv_momentum: a 5m bar closing in the extreme of its range on above-median volume OVERSHOOTS; fade it -> predict next bar AGAINST the close location. Direction found by rejecting the continuation hypothesis (robust negative 5/5 windows both symbols).

history.reason: Passing leaktest (TEST z=+9.2, hit 54.1%, n=12573) + robust walkforward (5/5 both symbols). Validated directional signal; economics unproven until forward paper nets out spread+fees.
